name: Paychex
description: Monitor Paychex payroll platform for employee data access and HR compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Sign up at https://developer.paychex.com
2. Go to My Apps → Create App
3. Copy Client ID and Client Secret
4. Base64 encode 'client_id:client_secret': echo -n 'id:secret' | base64
5. Enter the encoded value below

credentialFields.label: Encoded Credentials
credentialFields.helpText: Base64 encode 'client_id:client_secret'. Found in Paychex Developer Portal → My Apps. Command: echo -n 'id:secret' | base64

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Reviews Paychex payroll access and connected employee records

checks.name: App Availability
checks.description: Verifies Paychex payroll platform is operational
